title: Chicken Curry Recipe
description: A comforting Indian chicken curry simmered in light coconut milk with potatoes, aromatic spices, and fresh cilantro. Great over basmati rice, with naan, or cauliflower rice to keep the carbs low.
ingredients: 8 oz potato (1 large), peeled and diced small
instructions: Heat 1/2 tbsp olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium heat.
Add 1/2 minced onion and 5 cloves minced garlic, sauté 1 minute. Add 1/2 tsp roasted cumin, 1 1/2 tsp garam masala, and 2 tsp curry powder; mix well and cook 1 minute.
Place 6 skinless chicken thighs in the pan and season with 1 tsp kosher salt.
Add 1 chopped large tomato, 2 tbsp chopped fresh cilantro, 1/2 cup light coconut milk, and 2/3 cup water.
Stir all ingredients and cover the pan. Simmer on medium-low until chicken is cooked through, about 30 minutes.
Add 8 oz diced potato and 1/2 tsp kosher salt. Simmer, covered, an additional 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.

Pressure Cooker Option: Reduce water to 1/2 cup and cook the chicken after step 4 on high pressure for 15 minutes; quick release, then add potatoes on high pressure for 5 minutes. Let it release naturally.
